@@ -12,5 +12,5 @@

Great! I've made the card flipping animation quicker by reducing the duration from `0.6s` to `0.3s` (from 0.6 seconds to 0.3 seconds). This will make the cards flip twice as fast as before.

The change affects:
- The `--flip-duration` CSS variable which is set to `0.3s`
- This variable is used in the card transition on line 209: `transition: transform var(--flip-duration);`

The animation will now feel much more responsive and snappy when you click on cards to flip them. If you'd like it even faster or slower, I can adjust the value further - just let me know!
